meta.first_product: Shopify Order Sync + Inventory Alerts ($1000 setup + $200/month)
core_rules: Phone on airplane mode during deep work
If you skip 2 days in a row, identify root cause immediately

phase_1_foundation.goal: Build product + start outreach, book 2-3 discovery calls

phase_2_validation.goal: Close first client, deploy, collect testimonial

weeks.theme: Build product foundation + Set up systems
weeks.weekly_goal: NestJS project initialized, Shopify webhook receiver working, Notion CRM set up

days.title: Setup Day - Notion + Tools

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Watch 1 YouTube video on Shopify ecosystem + webhooks basics
Deep Work #1: Set up Notion dashboard, CRM, Task Tracker, Daily Routine databases
Deep Work #1 continued: Set up Notion dashboard, CRM, Task Tracker, Daily Routine databases
Deep Work #2: Phase 1 of build prompt: Initialize NestJS project, install dependencies, set up PostgreSQL + Prisma
Deep Work #2 continued: Phase 1 of build prompt: Initialize NestJS project, install dependencies, set up PostgreSQL + Prisma
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Complete Notion setup AND start NestJS project
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't spend all day customizing Notion - 2 hours max, then move to code
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: Notion dashboard live + NestJS project initialized
days.revenue_focused_action: Set up business infrastructure (Notion, GitHub repo)

days.title: Build Webhook Receiver

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Webhooks deep-dive (how they work, security, debugging)
Deep Work #1: Phase 2: Build Shopify webhook endpoint, learn HMAC signature verification
Deep Work #1 continued: Phase 2: Build Shopify webhook endpoint, learn HMAC signature verification
Deep Work #2: Continue Phase 2: Parse order data, store in PostgreSQL
Deep Work #2 continued: Continue Phase 2: Parse order data, store in PostgreSQL
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Webhook endpoint accepts test POST requests
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't skip HMAC verification - it's a security requirement for clients
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: Endpoint receives + parses test webhook payload
days.revenue_focused_action: Working webhook receiver = first sellable component

days.title: Test with Real Shopify

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Shopify API documentation overview
Deep Work #1: Create Shopify Partner account + dev store, connect to your webhook
Deep Work #1 continued: Create Shopify Partner account + dev store, connect to your webhook
Deep Work #2: Test real webhook flow, debug, store actual orders in DB
Deep Work #2 continued: Test real webhook flow, debug, store actual orders in DB
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Real Shopify order appears in your database
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't move to Google Sheets until webhook is rock-solid
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: One real test order successfully synced to DB
days.revenue_focused_action: End-to-end Shopify → your system flow working

days.title: Google Sheets OAuth Setup

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: OAuth2 flow explained (authorization code grant)
Deep Work #1: Phase 3: Set up Google Cloud project, enable Sheets API, configure OAuth2
Deep Work #1 continued: Phase 3: Set up Google Cloud project, enable Sheets API, configure OAuth2
Deep Work #2: Build OAuth flow in NestJS, get refresh token, test connection
Deep Work #2 continued: Build OAuth flow in NestJS, get refresh token, test connection
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: OAuth flow returns valid access token
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't hardcode credentials - use environment variables from day 1
days.revenue_focused_action: Google Sheets integration = key client value prop

days.title: Sheets Integration Working

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: API rate limits and retry strategies
Deep Work #1: Write function to append order to Google Sheet, handle errors
Deep Work #1 continued: Write function to append order to Google Sheet, handle errors
Deep Work #2: Connect webhook → DB → Sheets pipeline, end-to-end test
Deep Work #2 continued: Connect webhook → DB → Sheets pipeline, end-to-end test
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Test Shopify order appears in Google Sheet automatically
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't ignore error handling - clients will see all errors in production
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: One order syncs from Shopify → DB → Sheet successfully

days.title: Polish + Documentation

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Research 30 Shopify stores in your target range (500-2000 orders/month)
Deep Work #1: Add error handling, retry logic, logging to existing code
Deep Work #1 continued: Add error handling, retry logic, logging to existing code
Deep Work #2: Write internal README, document setup steps
Deep Work #2 continued: Write internal README, document setup steps
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: 20 prospects researched and added to CRM
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't research giants like Gymshark - target small/medium stores
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: Prospect list of 20 stores with contact info
days.revenue_focused_action: Build prospect list (20 Shopify stores in Notion CRM)

days.title: Week 1 Review

time_blocks.activity: Wake up (later, recovery day) + light breakfast
Plan next week in detail (tasks per day)

days.weekly_review_focus: Did I finish Phase 1-3 of build? Is prospect list ready? What blocked me?
days.next_week_focus: Complete product (Phase 4-6) + send first 10 cold messages
days.rest_day_rule: No work guilt. Recovery makes weekdays sustainable.

weeks.weekly_goal: Product deployed + 25 cold messages sent + 2 discovery calls booked

days.title: Inventory Monitoring

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: NestJS scheduled jobs / cron patterns
Deep Work #1: Phase 4: Build inventory check cron job, fetch Shopify inventory
Deep Work #1 continued: Phase 4: Build inventory check cron job, fetch Shopify inventory
Deep Work #2: Build email alert system with SendGrid integration
Deep Work #2 continued: Build email alert system with SendGrid integration
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Cron job runs every 6 hours, fetches inventory
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't poll too frequently - respect Shopify rate limits
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: Inventory checker working in dev mode
days.revenue_focused_action: Inventory alerts = second key value prop for clients

days.title: Email Alerts + Refund Logging

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: SendGrid email best practices + deliverability
Deep Work #1: Test email alerts trigger when stock below threshold
Deep Work #1 continued: Test email alerts trigger when stock below threshold
Deep Work #2: Add refund/cancellation webhook handler
Deep Work #2 continued: Add refund/cancellation webhook handler
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Test email arrives when low stock detected
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't use Gmail SMTP - use SendGrid for reliability
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: Email alert successfully sent on threshold breach

days.title: Admin Dashboard

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: NestJS serve static files + basic templating
Deep Work #1: Phase 5: Build simple HTML dashboard (sync status, recent orders, alerts)
Deep Work #1 continued: Phase 5: Build simple HTML dashboard (sync status, recent orders, alerts)
Deep Work #2: Add basic auth to dashboard, polish UI
Deep Work #2 continued: Add basic auth to dashboard, polish UI
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Dashboard accessible at /admin showing real data
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't over-design - functional > pretty for v1
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: Admin page shows real-time sync data
days.revenue_focused_action: Dashboard = visible value clients can see

days.title: Deploy to Production

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Railway deployment + environment management
Deep Work #1: Phase 6: Deploy to Railway.app, configure env vars
Deep Work #1 continued: Phase 6: Deploy to Railway.app, configure env vars
Deep Work #2: Connect production Shopify store, end-to-end test in prod
Deep Work #2 continued: Connect production Shopify store, end-to-end test in prod
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Deployed app accepts real Shopify webhooks in production
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't expose secrets in logs - sanitize all outputs
days.revenue_focused_action: Live deployable product = ready to sell

days.title: Client Onboarding Guide + First Outreach

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Cold email best practices (subject lines, opening hooks)
Deep Work #1: Phase 7: Write client onboarding guide (what info needed, setup steps)
Deep Work #1 continued: Phase 7: Write client onboarding guide (what info needed, setup steps)
Deep Work #2: Send first 10 cold outreach messages to Shopify stores (LinkedIn/email)
Deep Work #2 continued: Send first 10 cold outreach messages to Shopify stores (LinkedIn/email)
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: 10 cold messages sent + onboarding guide drafted
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't be salesy in first message - lead with value, not pitch
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: 10 outreach messages sent + tracked in CRM
days.revenue_focused_action: First 10 cold messages sent = pipeline started

days.title: Outreach Push + Follow-ups

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Watch 'how to handle objections' YouTube videos
Deep Work #1: Research 30 more Shopify stores, add to CRM
Deep Work #1 continued: Research 30 more Shopify stores, add to CRM
Deep Work #2: Send 15 more cold messages, follow up on Day 12 messages
Deep Work #2 continued: Send 15 more cold messages, follow up on Day 12 messages
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: 25 outreach messages sent + 50 total prospects in CRM
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't send identical messages - personalize the opening line

days.title: Week 2 Review

time_blocks.activity: Wake up (later, recovery day) + light breakfast
Plan next week in detail (tasks per day)

days.weekly_review_focus: Product deployed? Outreach messages sent? Any replies? Discovery calls booked?
days.next_week_focus: Convert replies to discovery calls + send 30 more outreach messages
days.rest_day_rule: No work guilt. Recovery makes weekdays sustainable.

weeks.theme: Convert replies to calls, send first proposals

days.title: Discovery Call Prep

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Discovery call best practices (asking pain-finding questions)
Deep Work #1: Follow up on outreach replies, schedule discovery calls
Deep Work #1 continued: Follow up on outreach replies, schedule discovery calls
Deep Work #2: Prepare discovery call script + scoping questions
Deep Work #2 continued: Prepare discovery call script + scoping questions
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Discovery call script ready + 1 call booked
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't pitch on first call - LISTEN and understand their pain
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: Call script written + at least 1 discovery call scheduled
days.revenue_focused_action: Schedule at least 1 discovery call this week

days.title: More Outreach + Calls

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Active listening + note-taking in sales calls
Deep Work #1: Send 10 more cold outreach messages (refined based on Week 2 learnings)
Deep Work #1 continued: Send 10 more cold outreach messages (refined based on Week 2 learnings)
Deep Work #2: Hold 1-2 discovery calls if scheduled, otherwise more outreach
Deep Work #2 continued: Hold 1-2 discovery calls if scheduled, otherwise more outreach
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: At least 1 discovery call held OR 10 new messages sent
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't over-promise on calls - underpromise, overdeliver
days.revenue_focused_action: Discovery calls = path to first dollar

days.title: Proposal Writing

time_blocks.activity: Deep Work #1: Write first proposal based on discovery call insights
Deep Work #1 continued: Write first proposal based on discovery call insights
Deep Work #2: Send proposal + schedule follow-up call
Deep Work #2 continued: Send proposal + schedule follow-up call
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: At least 1 proposal sent this week
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't make proposals too long - 1 page max, clear pricing
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: 1 proposal sent to a qualified prospect

days.title: Continue Outreach + Follow-ups

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Follow-up cadence (when, how often, what to say)
Deep Work #1: Send 10 more cold outreach messages
Deep Work #1 continued: Send 10 more cold outreach messages
Deep Work #2: Follow up on all pending replies + proposals
Deep Work #2 continued: Follow up on all pending replies + proposals
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: All pending prospects followed up + 10 new messages
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't ghost prospects - 4-7 follow-ups is normal
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: Follow-up tracker fully up to date
days.revenue_focused_action: Aggressive but professional follow-up = more closes

days.title: Refine + Push

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Sales objection handling (price, timing, trust)
Deep Work #1: Analyze what's working in outreach, refine templates
Deep Work #1 continued: Analyze what's working in outreach, refine templates
Deep Work #2: Send 10 more cold messages + push pending proposals
Deep Work #2 continued: Send 10 more cold messages + push pending proposals
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: 30 total messages sent this week + 2 proposals out
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't discount price early - hold the line, build value
days.revenue_focused_action: Aim to close first deal next week

days.title: Demo Prep + Content

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Loom basics for demo recordings
Deep Work #1: Record a 3-min demo video of your product working
Deep Work #1 continued: Record a 3-min demo video of your product working
Deep Work #2: Add demo video to outreach + send to interested prospects
Deep Work #2 continued: Add demo video to outreach + send to interested prospects
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Demo video recorded and shared with 5 prospects
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't make demo perfect - functional + clear > polished
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: Demo recorded + shared with at least 3 prospects

days.title: Week 3 Review

time_blocks.activity: Wake up (later, recovery day) + light breakfast
Plan next week in detail (tasks per day)

days.weekly_review_focus: Discovery calls held? Proposals sent? Any close-able deals?
days.rest_day_rule: No work guilt. Recovery makes weekdays sustainable.

weeks.weekly_goal: 1 client closed and onboarded, first $1000 collected

days.title: Close the Deal

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Contract basics (scope, payment terms, deliverables)
Deep Work #1: Push pending proposals to close (call/email + handle objections)
Deep Work #1 continued: Push pending proposals to close (call/email + handle objections)
Deep Work #2: Send contract/invoice for first client
Deep Work #2 continued: Send contract/invoice for first client
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Send invoice or contract for first deal
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't accept payment delays - 50% upfront, 50% on delivery
days.revenue_focused_action: CLOSE FIRST CLIENT - this is the goal

days.title: Client Onboarding

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Client communication best practices
Deep Work #1: Client kickoff call - gather Shopify access, Google Sheets, requirements
Deep Work #1 continued: Client kickoff call - gather Shopify access, Google Sheets, requirements
Deep Work #2: Begin deployment for client's specific store
Deep Work #2 continued: Begin deployment for client's specific store
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't start work without deposit - protect yourself
days.minimum_acceptable_progress: Deposit in bank + access credentials received

days.title: Build for Client #1

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Multi-tenant deployment patterns (separate instances per client)
Deep Work #1: Deploy NestJS instance for client, configure their Shopify store
Deep Work #1 continued: Deploy NestJS instance for client, configure their Shopify store
Deep Work #2: Connect their Google Sheet, test webhook flow
Deep Work #2 continued: Connect their Google Sheet, test webhook flow
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.critical_task: Client's Shopify connected to their system
days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't share credentials between clients - separate instances

days.title: Test + Polish for Client

time_blocks.activity: Deep Work #1: End-to-end test client's system, fix any bugs
Deep Work #1 continued: End-to-end test client's system, fix any bugs
Deep Work #2: Set up inventory alerts for client's specific products
Deep Work #2 continued: Set up inventory alerts for client's specific products
Daily Review (what worked, what didn't, tomorrow's #1)
Night Prep (plan tomorrow, read, phone away)

days.title: Handoff + Continue Outreach

Deep Work #1: Walkthrough call with client, hand off admin dashboard
Deep Work #1 continued: Walkthrough call with client, hand off admin dashboard

Deep Work #2 continued: Collect final payment, ask for testimonial + referrals

days.mistake_to_avoid: Don't forget to ask for referrals - 80% of clients will give 1-2

days.title: Case Study + Re-outreach

time_blocks.activity: Breakfast + Learning: Social proof in sales (testimonials, case studies)

Deep Work #1 continued: Write case study based on Client #1 (problem, solution, result)
Deep Work #2: Send case study with 15 new cold outreach messages
Deep Work #2 continued: Send case study with 15 new cold outreach messages

days.revenue_focused_action: Case study = closing tool for Client #2

time_blocks.activity: Wake up (later, recovery day) + light breakfast
Plan next week in detail (tasks per day)

Deep Work #2 continued: Send 15 cold messages with new case study

Deep Work #1 continued: Hold scheduled discovery calls with prospects

Deep Work #2 continued: Send 10 more cold messages, follow up on warm leads

Deep Work #2 continued: Follow up on all open proposals

Deep Work #1 continued: Send 10 more cold messages, refine templates again

Deep Work #2 continued: Build code improvements (template you can reuse for next client)

Deep Work #1 continued: Hold any pending discovery calls

Deep Work #2 continued: Push proposals to close - call/email pending decisions

morning_protocol: Physical reset (30 min): workout + cold shower
Mental prep (15 min): plan review + journal

emergency_protocols.if_skip_two_days: Identify root cause: energy? motivation? friction? Reduce task size for restart.
emergency_protocols.if_skip_three_plus_days: Major reset needed. Review whole system. Talk to accountability partner.
emergency_protocols.if_no_replies_to_outreach_in_2_weeks: Audit your messaging - is it clear, valuable, targeted?
emergency_protocols.if_first_client_not_closed_by_day_30: Don't panic. Review proposal/discovery process with fresh eyes.
emergency_protocols.if_client_churns: Analyze why immediately. Adjust offer/delivery. Don't blame yourself but learn fast.
emergency_protocols.if_overwhelmed: Cut scope: do MINIMUM revenue action today (1 outreach message). No zero days.

non_negotiables: Send at least 1 outreach message per workday
Never skip 2 days in a row
